## Page

Route or URL:

## Primary audience

- CEO / founder / executive
- Recruiter / hiring manager
- PMO / transformation leader
- Healthcare operations leader
- Digital-health / product team
- Mina / internal growth use

## Problem

What is unclear, weak, outdated, or missing?

## Proposed improvement

What should change?

## Quality checks

- [ ] This improves an existing page instead of creating a duplicate.
- [ ] The page keeps one clear audience and purpose.
- [ ] Strong claims are checked against the Claims Registry or Proof Room.
- [ ] The next action remains clear.
- [ ] Site validation should still pass.
